case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS RIVERA, MICHELLE J.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT.
